data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id,
       d.name AS department_name,
       COUNT(c.id) AS course_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.courses c
  ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC;

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

issues: Chart sorts departments alphabetically by name; if you intended to rank by number of courses, change sort to course_count descending.
If there are many departments, x-axis labels may overlap despite labelAngle -45; consider horizontal bars or wider chart for readability.
department_id is included in the tooltip (UUID); this is fine for debugging but may be unnecessary for end users.

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql:
SELECT d.id AS department_id,
       d.name AS department_name,
       COUNT(c.id) AS course_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.courses c
  ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name ASC;
